xposts.title: Human minds hallucinate; no input leads to dreams, no reasoning to delusion
xposts.excerpt: The hallucinations of LLMs are not a problem per se: human minds hallucinate too. If we remove the constraints of perceptual input, we spin off into dreams. If we don't verify our intuitive generations with reasoning, our thinking becomes delusional.

xposts.title: Consciousness is a dream state
xposts.excerpt: can't you see that consciousness is a dream state

xposts.title: Consciousness itself is a dream
xposts.excerpt: I don’t think we can, consciousness is itself a dream

xposts.title: Models are sleeping and dreaming; scaling enriches the dream
xposts.excerpt: It seems to me that the models are sleeping and dreaming, and while scaling gradually enriches the dream, it might take a nudge to wake them up.

xposts.title: Dream to be a spring: imbue model with consciousness
xposts.excerpt: You can imbibe a mental model of a spring with consciousness (dream to be a spring), so you will subjectively experience the interface between spring model and environment model
